name: eval-enhancement-verification
description: Verifies multi-iteration accuracy, concurrency, and the new eval runner features. Direct-mode cases run against any MCP server with the mock stdio server.

cases.description: Multi-iteration: 3 runs, all should pass. Echo tool returns 'Echo: hello' in content.
Multi-iteration: 5 runs of a deterministic calculation (7+3=10). Calculate tool returns 'Result: 10' in content.
Single-iteration baseline (no accuracy field expected). Verifies backward compatibility.
Multi-iteration: 3 runs with 50% accuracy threshold. Always passes since echo is deterministic.
